name: Shopkeeper
description: Sells consumables like health potions and buff elixirs.

dialogue.greeting: Welcome, traveler! What can I get for you?

name: Blacksmith
description: Upgrades and repairs weapons. Requires the Forge building.

dialogue.greeting: Bring me something to hammer on!

name: Scholar
description: Provides Tome page information and ability lore. Requires the Library building.

dialogue.greeting: Ah, another seeker of knowledge. Let me see your Tome.
dialogue.farewell: May the pages guide your path.

name: Navigator
description: Helps choose your next island destination. Requires the Docks building.

dialogue.greeting: The seas are calling. Where shall we chart a course?
